name: stagger-group
title: StaggerGroup
description: A composition primitive that reveals a list of items in sequence using the canonical Onda stagger (4 frames between siblings). The foundation pattern for animated lists, bullet build-ons, feature reveals, and any sequenced text reveal. Demonstrates the signature stagger fingerprint in its purest form.
pickWhen: revealing a list of arbitrary children, not a sentence. Bullets, feature rows, badges — anything with siblings.
